entry.title: New: Resolution 2026-09 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-03-11
entry.content:
Authorizing The Mayor And The Director Of Finance Of The County Of Kaua‘i To Enter Into An Intergovernmental Agreement With The State Of Hawai‘i And Department Of Health For A Loan From The State Water Pollution Control Revolving Fund For The Residential Cesspool Conversion Program (County Of Kaua‘i Residential Cesspool Conversion Program 2), Project No. RCC00KA-02

Latest action: On agenda 2026-03-11

View on the council site
